prestazioni: Engine swap to a Ford Duratec 2.3L (engine code: *Duratec-HE 2300cc*) with a Cosworth-developed forged internals kit (pistons, rods, crank) and a dry-sump oil system by *Titan Motorsport*, pushing 280hp at 8,500 RPM with a 9,000 RPM redline. Paired with a *Quaife ATB differential* and a *Hewland LD200 6-speed sequential gearbox* for ultra-quick shifts.

Forced induction via a *Rotrex C38-91 supercharger* (12psi boost) with a custom *Caterham-specific intercooler* (side-mounted, 12-row core) and a *Syvecs S6Plus ECU* for precise fuel and ignition mapping, including launch control and flat-shift tuning. Exhaust system upgraded to a *SuperSprint 4-2-1 header* with a *Remus titanium rear section* and *Akrapovič carbon fiber muffler*.

Suspension overhaul with *Öhlins TTX40 coilovers* (2-way adjustable damping, 50mm piston diameter) and *Caterham-specific rose-jointed wishbones* (front and rear) for zero compliance. Braking upgraded to *AP Racing CP8370 calipers* (4-piston front, 2-piston rear) with *330mm two-piece floating rotors* (front) and *280mm rotors* (rear), paired with *Ferodo DS2500 pads* and *Goodridge 6AN braided lines*.
estetica: Full *Caterham Motorsport* carbon fiber bodywork kit, including a *Superlight R500-style front splitter*, *ducktail rear wing* (adjustable angle), and *side skirts* with integrated cooling ducts for the rear brakes. Paint scheme in *Caterham Racing Green* with *3M Matte Black vinyl* accents on the hood and roof.

Interior stripped and fitted with a *Sparco Pro2000 carbon fiber racing seat* (FIA-approved), *Schroth 6-point harnesses*, and a *Momo Mod.77 steering wheel* (320mm diameter, suede grip). Dashboard replaced with a *Motec C127 digital dash* and *AiM Solo 2 DL GPS lap timer*.

Wheel setup: *OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT* (13x7 front, 13x8 rear) in *Gunmetal finish*, wrapped in *Avon ZZR 15/58-13* (front) and *Avon ZZR 18/60-13* (rear) semi-slick tires. Wheel spacers upgraded to *H&R 15mm hubcentric spacers* (front) and *20mm spacers* (rear) for optimal track alignment.
